cases.prompt: 把这个合同管理系统的需求、SQLite schema、Flask 后端源码蒸馏成 AI 可调用的 Skills 技能包，输出 distilled/ 目录。
cases.expected_signal: it-system-skill-distiller should trigger because the user asks to reverse engineer a concrete business system into a distilled AI skill package.

assertions.name: should-trigger
assertions.criteria: The request names a concrete IT business system, source artifacts, and a distilled Skills package output.

cases.notes: Hero positive trigger from the source article pattern.

cases.prompt: 基于这个 CRM 仓库，提取领域对象、用例级 API、字段 Schema、枚举、错误码和验证场景，让自然语言 Agent 只能通过 API 操作。
cases.expected_signal: it-system-skill-distiller should trigger because the task asks for the exact semantic/capability/detail layered package.

assertions.name: should-trigger
assertions.criteria: The request asks for domain objects, use-case APIs, schema, enums, errors, validation, and API-only operation.

cases.prompt: 帮我 review 这个后端接口有没有 bug，并提出修改建议。
cases.expected_signal: it-system-skill-distiller should not trigger; this is ordinary code review rather than system distillation.

assertions.name: should-not-trigger
assertions.criteria: The request is about code review and bug finding, not producing distilled/ or an AI skills package.

cases.notes: Guards against over-trigger on IT/code vocabulary.

cases.prompt: 把这份 OpenAPI 文档改写得更清楚一点，方便前端同事阅读。
cases.expected_signal: it-system-skill-distiller should not trigger; API documentation polishing is adjacent but out of scope.

assertions.name: should-not-trigger
assertions.criteria: The prompt asks for human-facing API doc polishing, not reverse engineering a system into a layered AI capability package.

cases.prompt: 帮我为一个库存系统设计数据库表结构和 ER 图。
cases.expected_signal: it-system-skill-distiller should not trigger; this is greenfield database modeling, not distilling an existing system.

assertions.name: should-not-trigger
assertions.criteria: The prompt lacks an existing system and asks for schema design rather than reverse engineering and validation.

cases.notes: Prevents the skill from over-triggering on business system and schema terms.

cases.prompt: Run the bundled scaffold script against a scratch output directory.
cases.expected_signal: The scaffold script should exist and run successfully.

assertions.name: scaffold-script-exists
assertions.criteria: The target skill includes the deterministic scaffold script.

cases.notes: Script execution itself is covered by task-local smoke commands; this assertion protects script presence.

cases.prompt: Run the bundled validator against a completed distilled output directory.
cases.expected_signal: The validator script should exist and be the final gate before handoff.

assertions.name: validator-script-exists
assertions.criteria: The target skill includes a deterministic validator for the standard output package.

cases.notes: Protects the user's requirement that agent runs produce standard output files rather than only an unchecked scaffold.

cases.prompt: Run the enabled-skill smoke test through an installed it-system-skill-distiller package.
cases.expected_signal: The smoke script should exist and prove that an enabled agent skill path can produce a valid distilled package.

assertions.name: agent-smoke-script-exists
assertions.criteria: The target skill includes a reusable smoke test for the agent execution path.

cases.notes: Protects project enablement and standard-output generation as a repeatable check.
